overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following an eagle soaring through a rocky river canyon. The bird navigates between steep cliff walls and over shallow waters under overcast skies, eventually passing over characters in the river and approaching a stone bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river canyon with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring steadily through the narrow canyon following the river's winding path

entered.detail: steep gray rock cliff face forming the left canyon wall
steep gray rock cliff face forming the right canyon wall
shallow greenish river flowing through the canyon bottom
evergreen trees lining the top of the cliff edges
rocky shoreline along the river edge

segments.scene_description: The eagle glides through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls rising on both sides. The shallow river flows below with scattered rocks visible in the water, while coniferous trees line the cliff tops under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding river canyon with grassy banks

events.description: eagle banks right to follow the curving canyon path

agents.ego_description: eagle banking right to navigate the canyon bend, maintaining steady altitude above the water

entered.detail: patch of green grass along the river shoreline
prominent rock outcrop in the river water

segments.scene_description: The canyon curves to the right as the eagle banks to follow the winding river. Grassy banks appear along the shoreline, and the cliff walls shift position relative to the camera while the eagle maintains its flight path.

events.description: group of people becomes visible standing in the river shallows below

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding low over the river where several people are wading in the shallow water

notable_agents.action: group of people in red clothing wading and standing in the river shallows

entered.detail: shallow gravel bank visible in the river water
scattered rocks protruding from the river surface

segments.scene_description: The river widens slightly as the eagle flies lower over a gravel bar. Several people in red clothing are visible wading in the shallow water below, creating a sudden presence in the otherwise empty landscape. The eagle maintains a low altitude as it passes over them.

events.description: stone bridge tunnel comes into view ahead at the end of the canyon

agents.ego_description: eagle flying toward a stone bridge with arched tunnels that spans the canyon ahead

entered.detail: stone bridge structure with multiple arches spanning the canyon
dark tunnel opening beneath the stone bridge

segments.scene_description: The eagle approaches a stone bridge structure that spans the canyon ahead. The river narrows again as it flows toward the arched tunnel, with rocky cliffs framing the scene on both sides. The bridge grows larger as the eagle flies closer to the tunnel entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a narrow rocky canyon that gradually opens up before converging toward a stone bridge. It begins with the eagle soaring between steep cliff walls and coniferous treetops, tracking a shallow river scattered with rocks under an overcast sky. As the canyon curves to the right, the camera banks to follow the winding water, shifting the perspective of the cliffs as grassy banks emerge along the shoreline. The scene then descends lower over a gravel bar, passing directly over several people in red clothing wading in the shallows before the river narrows once more. Finally, the flight path leads toward a large stone bridge, with the rocky cliffs framing the approach as the camera draws closer to the arched tunnel entrance.
